zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Noyers於大約1090年出生在法國諾門迪艾諾也斯時，她的父親Milon de Noyers II35歲，母親Anna de Toucy30歲。她於大約1103年與Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine在法國德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1126年之後在法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Noyers于大约1090年出生在法国諾門迪艾諾也斯时，她的父亲Milon de Noyers II35岁，母亲Anna de Toucy30岁。她于大约1103年与Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine在法国德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1126年之后在法国德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Noyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Bowyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Noyers was born about 1090, in Noyers, Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Milon de Noyers II, was 35 and her mother, Anna de Toucy, was 30. She married Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine about 1103, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1126, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Noyers est née environ 1090, à Noyers, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Milon de Noyers II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anna de Toucy, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine environ 1103, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1126, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Noyers um 1090 in Noyers, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Milon de Noyers II 35 und ihre Mutter Anna de Toucy 30. Sie hat um 1103 in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1126 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Noyers è nata il circa 1090 nel Noyers, Eure, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Milon de Noyers II, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Anna de Toucy, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine circa 1103, nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1126, nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Noyersが約1090年にフランスノーマンディエウアノイエルズで生まれた時，父Milon de Noyers IIは35歳，母Anna de Toucyは30歳であった。約1103年にフランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-セアインでMilon II de Bar-sur-Seineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1126年以後にフランスグランド エストアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Noyers(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 노예어스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Milon de Noyers II(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna de Toucy(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1103년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 바-수-세이인에서 Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1126년 이후 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Noyers nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Noyers, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Milon de Noyers II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anna de Toucy, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine aproximadamente 1103, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1126, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Noyers родилась около 1090 г. в местности ноиирс, эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Milon de Noyers II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna de Toucy, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine около 1103 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, гранд эст, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1126 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, гранд эст, Франция.

sm.ABT 1090–AFT 1126: e tusa o le 1090–ina ua ma'ea le 1126

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Noyers nació aproximadamente 1090, en Noyers, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Milon de Noyers II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Anna de Toucy, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine aproximadamente 1103, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1126, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia.
